# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: '2018-11-01'
    name: MyAzureFunc
    location: West US
    kind: functionapp
    identity: 
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId: '/subscriptions/<subscription-id>/resourcegroups/<resource-group>/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/<appservice-plan>'
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
        - name: AzureWebJobsStorage
          value: 'DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=<account-name>;AccountKey=<account-key>;EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net'
        - name: FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION
          value: '~3'
        - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
          value: 'dotnet'
        - name: WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING
          value: 'DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=<account-name>;AccountKey=<account-key>;EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net'
        - name: WEBSITE_CONTENTSHARE
          value: MyAzureFuncContent

  # Grant access to Key Vault, Storage, SQL, and Cosmos DB
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: 2020-04-01-preview
    name: '[guid(resourceId(''Microsoft.Web/sites'', MyAzureFunc), ''Contributor'')]'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/<subscription-id>/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/*'
      principalId: '[reference(resourceId(''Microsoft.Web/sites'', MyAzureFunc), ''2018-11-01'').identity.principalId]'
